title: RM-04B record RM-04
objective:

queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'RM-04':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = '62cf5625e287f9d4b77f4ffd259ecd9e1972cb13'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:33:28Z'
    if task.get('id') == 'RM-05':
        task['status'] = 'PENDING'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:37:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
line = json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:33:28Z','id':'RM-04','trace_id':'rm04_pass_diagnostic_consistency','sha':'62cf5625e287f9d4b77f4ffd259ecd9e1972cb13','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
if line not in existing:
    existing += line + '\n'
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/RM04B_RECORD_RM04_ACTIVATE_RM05.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'RM-04B','trace_id':'rm04b_record_rm04_activate_rm05','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'recorded_step':'RM-04','recorded_sha':'62cf5625e287f9d4b77f4ffd259ecd9e1972cb13','activated':'RM-05','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'RM-05 KZ-1 runners skeleton repair after pre-KZ blockers'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))

report.write_text('# RM-04B | Record RM-04 and activate RM-05\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nRM-04 recorded as DONE with SHA 62cf5625e287f9d4b77f4ffd259ecd9e1972cb13. RM-05 set to PENDING in governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json. Workflow lock respected.\n\nNext: RM-05 KZ-1 runners skeleton repair after pre-KZ blockers.\n', encoding='utf-8')
